title: Bolbitis aliena
taxonomy: Bolbitis aliena is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae. It belongs to the genus Bolbitis, which is a group of ferns that are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Lomariopsidaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, which includes a wide range of ferns. Bolbitis aliena is native to Southeast Asia, where it grows in shaded, humid environments. The plant is an epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
